'''鈭歫-m-h''' ('''kajamah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyophilise|lyophilise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyophilise|lyophilise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajamah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijamah|thijamah]] || [[word:jijamah|jijamah]] || [[word:shijamah|shijamah]] || [[word:kijamah|kijamah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujamah|thuthujamah]] || [[word:jujujamah|jujujamah]] || [[word:shushujamah|shushujamah]] || [[word:kukujamah|kukujamah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujamah|thujamah]] || [[word:jujamah|jujamah]] || [[word:shujamah|shujamah]] || [[word:kujamah|kujamah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujamah|thujamah]] || [[word:jujamah|jujamah]] || [[word:shujamah|shujamah]] || [[word:kujamah|kujamah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejamah|thejamah]] || [[word:jejamah|jejamah]] || [[word:shejamah|shejamah]] || [[word:kejamah|kejamah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojamah|thothojamah]] || [[word:jojojamah|jojojamah]] || [[word:shoshojamah|shoshojamah]] || [[word:kokojamah|kokojamah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojamah|thojamah]] || [[word:jojamah|jojamah]] || [[word:shojamah|shojamah]] || [[word:kojamah|kojamah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojamah|thojamah]] || [[word:jojamah|jojamah]] || [[word:shojamah|shojamah]] || [[word:kojamah|kojamah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jamah|th忙jamah]] || [[word:j忙jamah|j忙jamah]] || [[word:sh忙jamah|sh忙jamah]] || [[word:k忙jamah|k忙jamah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajamah|thathajamah]] || [[word:jajajamah|jajajamah]] || [[word:shashajamah|shashajamah]] || [[word:kakajamah|kakajamah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajamah|thajamah]] || [[word:jajamah|jajamah]] || [[word:shajamah|shajamah]] || [[word:kajamah|kajamah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajamah|thajamah]] || [[word:jajamah|jajamah]] || [[word:shajamah|shajamah]] || [[word:kajamah|kajamah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajamah|shajamah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajamah|goshajamah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajamah|gokishajamah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajamahn眉|shajamahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajamahnkn眉|goshajamahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamahn眉|gokishajamahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajamahsh毛|shajamahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajamahnksh毛|goshajamahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajamahsh毛|gokishajamahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamahro|shajamahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamahnkro|goshajamahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamahro|gokishajamahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamahmu|shajamahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamahnkmu|goshajamahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamahmu|gokishajamahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajamahsher|shajamahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajamahnksher|goshajamahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajamahsher|gokishajamahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajamahng|shajamahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajamahnkng|goshajamahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajamahng|gokishajamahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajamahya|shajamahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajamahnkya|goshajamahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajamahya|gokishajamahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajamahyam|shajamahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajamahnkyam|goshajamahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajamahyam|gokishajamahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamahn眉sh毛|shajamahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamahnkn眉sh毛|goshajamahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamahn眉sh毛|gokishajamahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamahn眉ro|shajamahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamahnkn眉ro|goshajamahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamahn眉ro|gokishajamahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamahn眉mu|shajamahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamahnkn眉mu|goshajamahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamahn眉mu|gokishajamahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamahsh毛n眉|shajamahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamahnksh毛n眉|goshajamahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamahsh毛n眉|gokishajamahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamahsh毛ro|shajamahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamahnksh毛ro|goshajamahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamahsh毛ro|gokishajamahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamahsh毛mu|shajamahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamahnksh毛mu|goshajamahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamahsh毛mu|gokishajamahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamahron眉|shajamahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamahnkron眉|goshajamahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamahron眉|gokishajamahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamahrosh毛|shajamahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamahnkrosh毛|goshajamahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamahrosh毛|gokishajamahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamahromu|shajamahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamahnkromu|goshajamahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamahromu|gokishajamahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamahmun眉|shajamahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamahnkmun眉|goshajamahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamahmun眉|gokishajamahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamahmush毛|shajamahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamahnkmush毛|goshajamahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamahmush毛|gokishajamahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamahmuro|shajamahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamahnkmuro|goshajamahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamahmuro|gokishajamahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
